  1. ....

View All Course/Staff Schedules (Compensation)

 

Usage Guide Lines (Searching and/or Adding Course(s)):

  • To add courses (if needed): please Click the + symbol next to Courses
    Note that filtering is optional, you can use it to find quickly a course by typing a part from its name or code into the white box provided.
  • To add instructor or TA, Click the + symbol next to Staff (if needed), also you can use the provided filter to quickly find the instructor
  • If you change your mind, simply click x symbol preceding the filter to remove this choice
  • Finally, Click on Show Schedule to View all selected courses and instructor’s scheduled slots
    e.g., to view slots of course A taught by staff X and slots of course B taught by staff Y, add the courses A and B, and staff members X and Y
  • Move your mouse cursor over any slot to see all slots for that course and all slots assigned to that instructor. Courses will be highlighted in red while the instructor’s will be in yellow

Filtering tips:

  • To select a specific course by code, simply enter its code in the filter and immediately the Courses list will be updated
  • This system filters are case insensitive
    e.g., if you typed: CSEN 202 is just like typing csen 202
  • Wildcard symbol: (.*)
  • Protip: you can use regular expressions

Courses: +

Staff: +
